description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large windows, a balcony, and a garage with space for multiple vehicles, as well as a driveway with parked cars. The exterior is predominantly white with some gray accents, and there are visible palm trees and minimal landscaping elements. The house has a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a spacious upper terrace and a partially covered ground-level entryway. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more functional. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a clean white exterior. Features include a balcony, driveway, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with parked cars, large windows, balcony, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, window placements, and the driveway extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a mostly solid wall, showing the back of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible entryway, some landscaping, and the driveway with cars.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed with a flat overhang, glass door, and minimal steps, flanked by large windows and a garage entrance.
